headline: CFOs On the Move: Week ending May 1
summary: Puma appoints a new chief financial officer, Booz Allen Hamilton names a former Boeing exec as CFO and PPG hires Avient’s finance chief.

raw.headline: CFOs On the Move: Week ending May 1

headline: Zevo And Antoni Porowski Collaboration Puts New Focus On P&G Valuation
summary: Zevo, a Procter & Gamble (NYSE:PG) pest control brand, has partnered with culinary personality Antoni Porowski to promote kitchen pest solutions. The collaboration focuses on consumer education around keeping cooking spaces free from insects and other household pests. This cross-industry effort is part of P&G's push to grow its presence in homecare and the competitive pest control segment. For investors watching NYSE:PG, this new Zevo and Antoni Porowski partnership sits within P&G's core...
